privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.subtitle: LGPD summary with purposes, legal bases and data subject rights.
privacy.p1: We collect name, email and message through the contact form for customer support (legal basis: legitimate interest/consent).
privacy.p2: You may request access, correction or deletion of your data via the DPO email: dpo@empresa.com.br.

productsPage.title: Product catalog
productsPage.subtitle: Explore the models by series and download the technical manuals.

aboutPage.heroText: Brazilian high-performance amplification technology since 2013. Designs made for stage, competition and street — with direct factory support.
aboutPage.whoWeAreP1: SOUNDMAX specializes in high-power, high-efficiency amplifiers, engineered to deliver consistent results in sound pressure, definition and electrical stability. Our engineering focuses on reliability, protection and after-sales support — because raw power with no control is useless.
aboutPage.whoWeAreP2: We serve both extreme car audio enthusiasts and professional audio users (stage, trios, events), with products designed, assembled and tested in Brazil.
aboutPage.missionP1: Provide reliable, stable and technically superior audio equipment — for those who demand real performance, quick support and true long-term durability.

values.qualityText: Reliable products, high power delivery, mechanical and electrical robustness, and long service life.
values.innovationText: Continuous evolution in topology, smart protection, thermal management and energy efficiency. We don’t just copy: we improve.
values.commitmentText: Direct communication, straight-to-the-point technical support and full focus on making your system play the right way.
values.localText: National engineering, job creation and development of the audio industry in Ceará.
values.safetyText: Electronic protections, good installation practices, selected components and respect for technical standards.
values.ethicsText: Serious, honest and straightforward work — with customers, suppliers and partners.

supportPage.title: Support & Service
supportPage.subtitle: Download manuals, open a ticket or find an authorized service center.

manuals.title: Manuals
manuals.text: Official PDFs by series and model.

ticket.title: Open a service ticket
ticket.text: Describe the issue and attach photos/videos.

assistance.title: Authorized service
assistance.text: Authorized service network with warranty coverage.

manualsModal.title: Technical manuals (PDF)
manualsModal.subtitle: Download the official manual for each model.
manualsModal.footer: Installation recommendations, cable gauge and safety instructions are described in each manual. Always respect the product's electrical limits.

supportTicketModal.title: Open support ticket
supportTicketModal.subtitle: Describe the issue and, if possible, attach photos. Support will continue via WhatsApp.

fields.contactHint: WhatsApp or email (at least one is required).
fields.problemPlaceholder: E.g.: K9.0 amplifier going into protection after 3 minutes of use...
fields.mediaLabel: Photos / video of the installation or issue (optional)
fields.mediaHint: These media files are NOT sent automatically. When WhatsApp opens, attach the same photos/videos to the conversation.
fields.consentLabel: I authorize SoundMax to contact me for technical support.

feedback.errorRequired: Fill in the required fields. WhatsApp or email is mandatory.
feedback.success: Done! Just attach the photos in the WhatsApp chat 👍
